heading: Documents beyond scope of ordinary departmental business
label: 1118 Documents beyond scope of ordinary departmental business
text: A book or document not having to do with the ordinary business transactions of the executive departments may not be printed on the requisition of a department unless expressly authorized by Congress.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 219a (, ).Mar. 3, 1905, ch. 1484, § 133 Stat. 1249
